{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Douji
| aliases = Douji
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|lightning artist, purple lightning spirit}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] Douji is a member of the [[Akura clan]] and a practitioner of lightning-based [[madra]]. Within their combat structures, Douji has trained extensively alongside [[Grace]] and is frequently paired with them for assignments. During large-scale conflicts, Douji has been observed operating alongside [[Akura Courage]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Douji]] is a lightning artist.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Douji is a cousin of [[Grace]] and [[Courage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Douji]] shot up the stairs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The purple lightning spirit was [[Akura Douji]]’s [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Douji]] is a deceased member of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
